name: 7q11_21_RFC2_adjacent_SD
description: 7q11.21 region centromeric-adjacent to the Williams-Beuren critical region, containing POM121-like and RFC2-paralog duplicons. Acts as substrate for atypical/large WBS deletions extending beyond the canonical 1.55 Mb interval.

architecture.internal_structure: Multiple POM121-like and NSUN5/TRIM50 paralog duplicons distributed across 7q11.21 acting as auxiliary breakpoints for atypical Williams-Beuren rearrangements.
